lock_policy: Dated official pick files are append-only after an official pick is recorded. Zero-pick snapshots remain provisional until first pitch.
note: Official picks require market edge, model probability >= 72%, Lab Rating >= 8.0/10, pitcher support, and no major bullpen caution.

labScoreBreakdown.note: Lab Rating grades setup quality. It is not win probability.

pick_team.label: Normal
pick_team.workload_read: Manageable recent workload. Bullpen should still be part of the full-game read.
pick_team.score_reason: Normal (6.1/10): 6.3 recent relief innings, recency-weighted (2 days since last game), 3 arms worked back-to-back days. Recent innings count more; rest days lower the score. Workload only — see efficiency for how well the pen has pitched.
pick_team.formula: 45 + (recency-weighted (BP IP - 3/game) x 4.2) + (recency-weighted back-to-back arms x 8). Each game decays by half every 2 days, so rest days lower the score.

context_only.note: Reliever counts are displayed for context only and do not add score points.

pick_team.efficiency_reason: Effective (6.7/10): 1.42 ERA and 1.26 WHIP over 6.3 relief innings (1 ER, 6 H, 2 BB) in the last three days.
pick_team.efficiency_formula: 50 - clamp((ERA - 4.20) x 6, -25, 25) x confidence - clamp((WHIP - 1.30) x 15, -20, 20) x confidence, confidence = clamp(BP IP / 6, 0.35, 1)

opponent.label: Normal
opponent.workload_read: Manageable recent workload. Bullpen should still be part of the full-game read.
opponent.score_reason: Normal (5.7/10): 4 recent relief innings, recency-weighted (2 days since last game), 4 arms worked back-to-back days. Recent innings count more; rest days lower the score. Workload only — see efficiency for how well the pen has pitched.
opponent.formula: 45 + (recency-weighted (BP IP - 3/game) x 4.2) + (recency-weighted back-to-back arms x 8). Each game decays by half every 2 days, so rest days lower the score.

context_only.note: Reliever counts are displayed for context only and do not add score points.

opponent.efficiency_reason: Below average (4.0/10): 6.75 ERA and 1.25 WHIP over 4 relief innings (3 ER, 5 H, 0 BB) in the last three days.
opponent.efficiency_formula: 50 - clamp((ERA - 4.20) x 6, -25, 25) x confidence - clamp((WHIP - 1.30) x 15, -20, 20) x confidence, confidence = clamp(BP IP / 6, 0.35, 1)

moneyline.why: Boston Red Sox is an official moneyline pick because it clears both gates: 73.0% model win probability and 8.1/10 Lab Rating. LyDia projects 73.0% against a 55.9% no-vig market number, a 17.0% model edge at -135. Boston Red Sox owns the starting pitcher edge by 13 points. Bullpen read: Elevated volatility. Boston Red Sox's pen efficiency: Effective (6.7/10). Lineup check: Boston Red Sox is swinging a hot bat (+0.092 OPS); Baltimore Orioles is a touch above its season form (+0.047 OPS).
moneyline.risk: No model can see every live lineup, injury, or late bullpen availability update. Recheck official news before first pitch.
